_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
procedure_name: Ano Rectal Malformation- Abd - Perineal PSARP

preauth.label: Clinical notes indicating whether other associated congenital disorders like those of spine, anus, heart, trachea, esophagus, kidneys, or limbs, etc. are present/not

ppd_preauth.q: Clinical notes detailed history, signs & symptoms, presence of other associated congenital disorders like those of spine, anus, heart, trachea, esophagus, kidneys, or limbs, etc. are present/not and indication(s) for procedure?
Does the patient presented with absent anus, abdominal distention, vomiting, meconium per urethra in males / passage of stool through vagina in females?
Are the following tests being done - Distal cologram in males, USG abdomen / X ray scan in both the sexes?

common_queries: Patient does not present with absent anus, abdominal distention, vomiting, meconium per urethra in males or passage of stool through vagina in females, without justification.
Required tests (Distal cologram in males, USG abdomen, X-ray scan in both sexes) not performed or not available.
Clinical notes lack detailed history, signs & symptoms, presence/absence of associated congenital disorders (spine, anus, heart, trachea, esophagus, kidneys, or limbs) or indication(s) for procedure.
Distal Cologram/Barium enema, USG Abdomen, or X-ray Lumbosacral spine (inverted position) not provided at pre-authorization.

clinical_key_pointers: Trouble having a bowel movement, or constipation
surgical_options: Ano Rectal Malformation- Abd - Perineal PSARP
Ano Rectal Malformation- Redo pull through
